message:
test(fcp-core): add golden vector tests for Trust/Quorum model

- Add PartialEq impl for SignatureSet (comparing only signatures, not cache)
- Add PartialEq derive for DegradedModeState
- Add golden vector tests for quorum serialization:
  - test_golden_vector_quorum_3_of_3: 3-node unanimous quorum
  - test_golden_vector_quorum_3_of_5: 5-node cluster with 3 signatures
  - test_golden_vector_degraded_state: degraded mode state
- Generate canonical CBOR golden vectors for interoperability testing:
  - quorum_3_of_3.cbor (700 bytes)
  - quorum_3_of_5.cbor (699 bytes)
  - degraded_state.cbor (209 bytes)

Closes: flywheel_connectors-q10z

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
